summary_en: Redeem these codes for Grow a Garden 2 to earn free rewards including seeds.
body_en:
Grow a Garden 2 codes will get your garden blossoming by giving you seeds you can plant before you even spend a Sheckle on a Carrot. GaG 2 is the sequel to the farming sim we all spent far too many hours in during 2025, desperately hoping we'd get a Candy Blossom seed.
The major difference is that now there's a night cycle, where you get to be a little thief and steal your neighbour's crops. But beware, they can also steal yours. There are also Guilds you can join, where you'll get to compete to earn exclusive weekly prizes such as the Ice Serpent pet.
We've found the only active code that there is so far. But we'll be checking daily to see if new GaG 2 codes are released, making it easy for you to copy them on whatever device you're using.
There are no expired codes.
I'm just as excited as you are that Grow a Garden 2 is here, so we'll be on the lookout every day to see if new codes are released. With that in mind, the best way to stay up to date with new GaG 2 code releases is to keep this page bookmarked. You can also visit the official Grow a Garden Discord . But why do all the hard work when we can do it for you?
GaG 2 has announced their first update since launch, which will take place on Friday June 19, 2026. No details have been released yet, but you can check the event page here .
Lauren Harper is an Associate Guides Editor at IGN. She loves a variety of games but is especially fond of puzzles, horrors, and point-and-click adventures. She leads the Roblox coverage as part of her role, so she's always on the lookout for new codes and experiences to test out.
